Title: Full Stack Developer for Startup MVP
Description: We’re working on a financial technology product targeted toward emerging markets. The MVP will include user authentication, a dashboard for analytics, and transaction support. We're looking for a highly experienced developer who can own the full stack, make architectural decisions, and collaborate closely with the design team to iterate rapidly. Clean, modular code and agile thinking are a must.
